name: ddd-workshop
description: DDD pipeline with three paired skills (phase 1 of multi-phase rollout). (1) domain-classroom — teaches general industry patterns of an unfamiliar domain in lecture mode grounded in cognitive-science 8 principles. Output: docs/learning-notes/{domain}-classroom.md. (2) eventstorming — Brandolini EventStorming 3 levels (Big Picture, Process Modeling, BC + Subdomain Discovery) unified into a single cycle tool with auto-mode-detection. One invocation reads current state and enters the appropriate cycle. Router SKILL.md with references/ submodules — only the active cycle's reference is loaded. Domain-event 4-criteria gate prevents UI/telemetry contamination. Korean natural-language + Code Identifier dual notation. Self-contained Sticky convention (10 emojis, no conflicts: 🟧Event ⭐Pivotal 🟦Command 🟪Policy 🟩Read Model 🟨Actor 🟫Aggregate 🟥External 🔥Hotspot ⬜UI). Output: docs/eventstorming/ (index.md + {NN-phase}/bigpicture.md + {NN-phase}/{workflow}.md). Closing BC + Subdomain Discovery cycle clusters 6 signals into BC candidates and updates the bigpicture appendix — ADR creation is delegated to software-design. (3) software-design — Strategic → Tactical bridge. Takes BC + Workflow candidates as input and persists structural decisions (folder structure, CQRS depth, cross-BC access, BC integration patterns, aggregate transactional boundaries, etc.) as immutable ADRs after discussing 2-4 options + trade-off matrix with the user. One invocation = one decision = one ADR. Follows Anthropic /architecture ADR format. Output: docs/adr/{NNNN}-{slug}.md. Phase 2 will add tactical-design (per-workflow implementation plan) and playbook (orchestration rules in AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md).
